# llms.txt — brianschrader.com
# https://llmstxt.org

> Personal blog of Brian Schrader. Thoughts on technology, programming,
> history, and whatever else seems interesting.

## Allowed

- /archive/ — blog posts
- /about/ — about the author
- /feed.json — JSON Feed
- /rss.xml — RSS Feed

## Disallowed

- /other-projects/protected-gallery/ — licensed images, not available for training or indexing
